title: Covellia ribes
taxonomy: Covellia ribes is classified as a genus of fungi within the family of Asterinaceae. This genus is further classified under the order Pleosporales in the class Dothideomycetes. The kingdom to which Covellia ribes belongs is Fungi. The species Covellia ribes is a type of fungus that grows on plants, specifically Ribes, from which it gets its name. More research may be needed to determine the exact classification within the kingdom of Fungi.
